vlm_note: Clean 8-piece opening (4 settlements + 4 roads). TWO known gotchas handled: (1) empty_baseline board fit FAILED (camera pan), so the board was re-fit from post_setup.png (read_board_stable residual 0.98px) and the vertex overlay rendered from that; (2) meta player_colors are WRONG (it lists Aniz=RED, ThePhantom=BLACK, but the actual pieces are PURPLE and BLACK) - so players were assigned by the COLOUR-AGNOSTIC grant self-check, not by colour. PURPLE pieces -> ThePhantom (grant {SHEEP:1,WOOD:2} matches PURPLE's v23=[6,16,17]=WOO4+WOO10+SHE8). BLACK pieces -> Aniz (grant {SHEEP:2,WOOD:1} matches BLACK's v11=[2,9,10]=SHE10+WOO5+SHE8). ThePhantom settlements v8=[1,7,18] and v23=[6,16,17] (roads v8-v7, v23-v19). Aniz settlements v17=[4,5,14] and v11=[2,9,10] (roads v17-v5, v11-v10). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES per player: ThePhantom {SHEEP:1,WOOD:2}=v23 only (v8={WHEAT,BRICK,BRICK}); Aniz {SHEEP:2,WOOD:1}=v11 only (v17={WHEAT,ORE,BRICK}). Read from 2x/3x-upscaled crops.
